title: Mile Die Club
description: Your evening begins with a flight. As the Brighton i360 lifts you 450ft above the city, fizz flows, the view is breath-taking... and something is very wrong. You’ll descend into the i360 dining room for an indulgent three-course dinner, where the suspects mingle between the tables. Between courses, you’ll interrogate them, challenge their alibis, uncover clues and compare notes with your fellow guests. And before the final course is cleared, you’ll need to decide: who deserves to be exposed as a murderer? This is not theatre you watch. This is a crime you solve. What’s included: A premium three-course dinner An immersive, story-led murder mystery experience Exclusive ascent on the Brighton i360 Live interaction with a professional cast Fizz on arrival and wine with the meal A final reveal — and bragging rights if you get it right Perfect for thrill-seekers, special occasions, corporate entertaining, or anyone who believes dinner should come with a body count.
content_warnings: There will be references to a murder
